title: Cosmetic Armor: Revitalized [FABRIC]
description: A 1.21+ port of the Cosmetic Armor Mod made by Apace100
body:
This is a direct port of Apace100's [Cosmetic Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-fabric) mod to 1.21. As such I wont list out all of the configuration options, since they are on the original mods page.

Requires: [Trinkets API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets-fabric)

All credits go to Apace100 for the original version of this mod, I am simply making it available for 1.21 :D
